name: @pryzm/typology-pipeline
description: A.1 (Phase A · Sprint 1) — L3 multi-typology generative pipeline.  TypologyRegistry (in-memory list of installed typology packs by id) + PipelineRouter (the 7-stage orchestrator: brief → site → constraints → generative-or-deterministic → validators → cognition → BIM-emission).  Consumes @pryzm/schemas TypologyManifest.  No I/O at this layer — adapters live in apps/editor.
